quests.name: Not Your Average Squeaky Toy
objectives: Talk to Woody.
Visit Buzz's RV.
Clean up the 5 mess in Buzz's RV.
Talk to Woody in Buzz's RV.

Gather Ingredients for the Plastic Filler:
  ‧ 10 Sugarcane.
  ‧ 10 Wheat.

Make sure you have the Ingredients for the 'Plastic Filler to repair Buzz's RV.
  ‧ 10 Sugarcane.
  ‧ 10 Wheat.
Bring the Ingredients for the Plastic Filler to Woody in Buzz's RV.
Talk to Mirabel.
Talk to Tramp.
Put the 10 Elegant White Fences down anywhere in the Valley to make a dog park for Tramp.
Talk to Tramp.
Visit Lady and Tramp's House.
Pick up the 4 Dog Toy Wheels inside Lady and Tramp's House.

Gather the remaining materials to craft the Edwardian Dog Toy:
  ‧ 40 Stone.
  ‧ 30 Fiber.
  ‧ 4 Dog Toy Wheels.
  ‧ 2 Peridot.
Craft the Edwardian Dog Toy.
Place the Edwardian Dog Toy anywhere in the Valley.
Take a picture of Tramp near his new dog toy.
Talk to Tramp.

quests.name: Cleanliness Is Next to Dogliness
objectives: Go inside Lady and Tramp's House.
Talk to Lady.
Use your Royal Watering Can to clean up the mess in Lady and Tramp's House
Pick up the special soil left behind from Tramp's mess
Talk to Daisy inside her House.

Plant the flower seeds that Daisy gave you:
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Hydrangeas.
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Purple Rising Penstemons.

Water the flowers with the Royal Watering Can and wait 5 minutes as they grow.
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Hydrangeas.
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Purple Rising Penstemons.

Harvest the Fragrant Flowers for Daisy.
  ‧ Return to Daisy's House to give her the Fragrant Flowers.
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Hydrangeas.
  ‧ 5 Fragrant Purple Rising Penstemons.
Order an Edwardian Dog Bath from Scrooge for 5,000 Star Coins.
Bring the Edwardian Dog Bath to Daisy.
Bring the Edwardian Dog Bath to Daisy in her House.
Put the Heavy-Duty Dog Shampoo in the Edwardian Dog Bath

Gather Ingredients for Mike's cologne:
  ‧ Clam.
  ‧ Seaweed.
  ‧ Infused Rich Soil.
  ‧ Wet Fur.
Cook the Eau-de-Chien-Soggy.
Be sure to have the Eau-de-Chien-Soggy in your Inventory.
Bring the Eau-de-Chien-Soggy to Mike Wazowski.
Go see Daisy inside her House.
Talk to Tramp.

quests.name: And How Did That Make You Feel?
objectives:
Put flags in the Biomes for Timon and Tramp.
  ‧ Red Flag on the Sunlit Plateau.
  ‧ Blue Flag in the Forest of Valor.
Talk to Tramp.
Talk to Joy.
Fish out Joy's Wet Blanket from a pond in the Peaceful Meadow.
Be sure you have Joy's Wet Blanket with you.
Bring Joy's Wet Blanket back to Joy.
Go inside the Emotion's Headquarters.
Set up the discussion zone with Joy's Comfy Blanket and Sadness's Tissue Box in the middle of the room.
Talk to Tramp.

Re-order the jumbled Memory by touching the Orb inside the Emotion's Headquarters.
  ‧ You can find the puzzle Memory inside the Quest Puzzles section of the Collection menu.
Talk to Tramp.

Gather resources to craft a Zoo Fountain:
  ‧ 20 Dry Wood.
  ‧ 20 Stone.
  ‧ 5 Brick.
Craft the Zoo Fountain.
Place the Zoo Fountain in the Valley.
Play in the Zoo Fountain with Tramp, Timon, and Pumbaa.
Talk to Tramp.

quests.name: Canine Archaeology
objectives:
Follow Tramp to the mysterious buried object on the Sunlit Plateau.
  ‧ (Hint: Put on the Substitute Snout to sniff the location.)
Dig out and pick up the mysterious buried object.
Talk to Tramp.
Follow Tramp to the next piece of the statue.
Fish the object out of the water on Dazzle Beach.
Talk to Tramp.
Talk to Nala about the missing statue pieces.
Follow Tramp.
Chase away the 3 ravens from the final piece of the statue.

Dig up the final piece of the statue.
  ‧ (Hint: Put on the Substitute Snout to sniff out the location too.)
Visit Lady and Tramp's House.
Assemble the pieces of the Lady and Tramp Statue.
Talk to Tramp.
Talk to Cogsworth.
Use the Metal Polish to clean up the Lady and Tramp Statue inside their House.
Talk to Tramp.
